name: vocalmix-server
description: VocalMix – Personal monitor mix server for Allen & Heath dLive

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.node.json && tsc -p tsconfig.web.json && mkdir -p dist/client dist/ui && cp client/index.html client/styles.css dist/client/ && cp ui/index.html dist/ui/ && printf '{"type":"module"}\n' > dist/client/package.json && printf '{"type":"module"}\n' > dist/ui/package.json
